creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 230200
devel/py-mock: Update to 4.0.3

This patch should update devel/py-mock to 4.0.3. As far as I can tell, there's little to do here from a ports perspective besides removing the now unnecessary dependency on py-six (at least according to upstream's setup.cfg changes).

testport: OK (poudriere: 130amd64)
do-test: OK (494 passed in 3.49 seconds)

I've also used the resulting package to run the testsuite of py-matrix-synapse, which works fine.

Feedback is very welcome, as always. :)
